files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.AnalyticsDashboardForm
files.Summary: Provides advanced data visualization and statistical analysis for club performance. Integrates Match results and Training session data to provide a comprehensive squad overview.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.CompetitionManager
files.Summary: Coordinates performance data for matches and skill assessments. Acts as the business bridge for player development tracking.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.DashboardForm
files.Summary: Displays key performance indicators (KPIs) and recent activity summaries. Provides shortcuts to primary system modules and manages high-level statistical visualization.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.DbHelper
files.Summary: Serves as the Data Access Layer (DAL) helper class. Centralizes and manages all underlying connections to the MySQL database.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.EditMemberForm
files.Summary: User interface form designed for modifying existing player profiles within the database. Provides validation feedback and contextual help for administrative and coaching staff.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.EditTrainingForm
files.Summary: A dynamic popup form for securely editing existing training logs.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.LoginForm
files.Summary: Manages the secure authentication process for the application. Validates credentials using SHA-256 hashing and establishes the user's security context.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.MainForm
files.Summary: Acts as the main container and navigation controller for the application. Manages the visibility, layering, and role-based access of child modules.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.MatchResultForm
files.Summary: User interface form for recording and archiving the results of competitive matches. Captures opposition details, half-time statistics, and full-time results with integrated user guidance.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.Player
files.Summary: Represents the core business entity for a Rugby Player. Encapsulates standard information required by the Scottish Rugby Union (SRU) alongside fundamental business rules.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.PlayerManager
files.Summary: Centralized business logic layer for all player-related data operations. Handles registration, updates, deletions, and retrieval of performance assessments.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.RegisterJuniorForm
files.Summary: Manages the user interface for entering new junior player information. Provides input validation, placeholder logic, and contextual help for the registration process.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.SecurityUtil
files.Summary: Provides system-level security utilities, specifically focusing on cryptographic functions. Fulfills advanced security requirements by preventing plain-text password storage.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.SkillAssessmentForm
files.Summary: Facilitates technical player evaluations by recording skill ratings and coaching notes. Provides interactive feedback and contextual guidance for technical assessments.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.TrainingManager
files.Summary: Handles database operations for training sessions and attendance. Fully implements CRUD capabilities with relational mapping.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.TrainingSessionForm
files.Summary: User interface form for documenting training sessions and tracking player attendance. Provides dynamic generation of attendance controls and contextual help for coaching staff.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.User
files.Summary: Represents an authenticated system user within the Simply Rugby application. Serves as the primary entity for managing Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) and user identity.

files.Title: SimplyRugby_System.ucMemberDirectory
files.Summary: Directory interface for viewing member details and accessing player management tools. Provides administrative functions including viewing, editing, and deleting player profiles.
